message:
feat: broad hardening pass — graph search, telemetry pipeline, cache/WAL resilience, and conformance fixes

A wide-reaching quality and robustness pass touching 31 files across
the frankensearch workspace (+742 lines, -141 lines):

New modules:
- frankensearch-core/src/graph.rs: new graph-based search support
  module for knowledge-graph-augmented retrieval
- frankensearch-index/src/repro_bug.rs: reproduction harness for an
  index corruption edge case under concurrent WAL compaction

Search engine core:
- searcher.rs: major expansion (+176 lines) — add lifecycle/resource
  telemetry hooks, federated sub-searcher coordination improvements,
  and graph-augmented query path
- search.rs: expand index search with better scoring normalization
  and edge-case handling for empty segments (+90 lines)
- warmup.rs: add segment pre-warming with memory-budget awareness
  (+62 lines)
- wal.rs: harden write-ahead log with improved fsync discipline,
  compaction checkpoint recovery, and corrupted-entry skip (+80 lines)

Telemetry & observability:
- telemetry_adapter_common.sh: add 64-line shared telemetry shell
  library for E2E test scripts (structured JSONL emission, stage
  accounting, timeout handling)
- metrics.rs: expand metric counters with graph-search and cache
  eviction tracking
- pressure.rs / pressure_sensing.rs: improve memory-pressure
  detection with smoothed readings and configurable thresholds

Cache & configuration:
- cache.rs: add TTL-aware eviction and cache-hit-ratio telemetry
- config.rs: extend FSFS config with pressure-sensing tunables
- types.rs: add graph-search result types to the core type system

Fusion & reranking:
- conformal.rs: expand conformal prediction calibration with
  confidence-interval telemetry
- model2vec_embedder.rs: refactor embedding batch pipeline for
  better error propagation
- pipeline.rs: add reranking telemetry emission
- rrf.rs, federated.rs, lexical/lib.rs: minor import/use fixes

Tests & benchmarks:
- interaction_integration.rs, interaction_unit.rs: fix imports
- cross_component.rs, bench_quick.rs, validate_fusion.rs,
  search_bench.rs: fix imports for new types
- optimize_params/main.rs: align with updated config API

Beads: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1280,6 +1280,7 @@ mod tests {
                 quality_score: None,
                 lexical_score: None,
                 rerank_score: None,
+                explanation: None,
                 metadata: None,
             },
             source_index: "primary".into(),

@@ -66,6 +66,7 @@ fn make_lexical_hits(n: usize) -> Vec<ScoredResult> {
             quality_score: None,
             lexical_score: Some((n - i) as f32),
             rerank_score: None,
+            explanation: None,
             metadata: None,
         })
         .collect()

@@ -382,6 +382,7 @@ fn make_lexical(ids: &[&str], scores: &[f32]) -> Vec<ScoredResult> {
             quality_score: None,
             lexical_score: Some(score),
             rerank_score: None,
+            explanation: None,
             metadata: None,
         })
         .collect()

@@ -143,6 +143,11 @@ telemetry_adapter_classify_stage_failure_reason() {
     return 0
   fi
 
+  if grep -Fq "Project sync failed: rsync failed" <<<"$transcript_tail"; then
+    printf "%s" "telemetry_adapter.stage.remote_worker_sync_failed"
+    return 0
+  fi
+
   if grep -Fq "does not contain this feature" <<<"$transcript_tail"; then
     printf "%s" "telemetry_adapter.stage.invalid_feature_flag"
     return 0
@@ -156,6 +161,23 @@ telemetry_adapter_classify_stage_failure_reason() {
   printf "%s" "telemetry_adapter.stage.failed"
 }
 
+telemetry_adapter_run_local_circuit_fallback() {
+  local repo="$1"
+  shift
+  local -a cargo_cmd=("$@")
+
+  {
+    printf '$ (cd %q && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=%q RCH_MOCK_CIRCUIT_OPEN=1 rch exec --' "$repo" "$TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_CARGO_TARGET_DIR"
+    printf ' %q' "${cargo_cmd[@]}"
+    printf ')\n'
+  } >>"$TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_TRANSCRIPT_TXT"
+
+  (
+    cd "$repo" &&
+    CARGO_TARGET_DIR="$TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" RCH_MOCK_CIRCUIT_OPEN=1 rch exec -- "${cargo_cmd[@]}"
+  ) >>"$TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_TRANSCRIPT_TXT" 2>&1
+}
+
 telemetry_adapter_run_rch_cargo() {
   local stage="$1"
   local repo="$2"
@@ -241,6 +263,48 @@ telemetry_adapter_run_rch_cargo() {
   TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_LAST_FAILURE_STAGE="$stage"
   TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_LAST_FAILURE_EXIT_CODE="$exit_code"
   failure_reason="$(telemetry_adapter_classify_stage_failure_reason "$exit_code")"
+
+  if [[ "$failure_reason" == "telemetry_adapter.stage.remote_path_dependency_missing" || "$failure_reason" == "telemetry_adapter.stage.remote_dependency_resolution_failed" || "$failure_reason" == "telemetry_adapter.stage.remote_worker_sync_failed" ]]; then
+    telemetry_adapter_emit_event \
+      "$stage" \
+      "warn" \
+      "telemetry_adapter.stage.retrying_local_circuit" \
+      "remote dependency issue (${failure_reason}); retrying with local-circuit mode"
+
+    local fallback_start_ts
+    local fallback_end_ts
+    local fallback_duration_s
+    local fallback_exit
+    fallback_start_ts="$(date +%s)"
+    # Keep fallback invocation in condition context so `set -e` does not
+    # short-circuit the script before we can classify/log fallback failures.
+    if telemetry_adapter_run_local_circuit_fallback "$repo" "${cargo_cmd[@]}"; then
+      fallback_exit=0
+      fallback_end_ts="$(date +%s)"
+      fallback_duration_s=$((fallback_end_ts - fallback_start_ts))
+      telemetry_adapter_emit_event \
+        "$stage" \
+        "ok" \
+        "telemetry_adapter.stage.ok_local_circuit_fallback" \
+        "local-circuit fallback succeeded in ${fallback_duration_s}s after ${failure_reason}"
+      telemetry_adapter_mark_stage_completed
+      TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_ACTIVE_STAGE=""
+      return 0
+    else
+      fallback_exit=$?
+      fallback_end_ts="$(date +%s)"
+      fallback_duration_s=$((fallback_end_ts - fallback_start_ts))
+      failure_reason="telemetry_adapter.stage.local_circuit_fallback_failed"
+      exit_code="$fallback_exit"
+      duration_s=$((duration_s + fallback_duration_s))
+      telemetry_adapter_emit_event \
+        "$stage" \
+        "fail" \
+        "$failure_reason" \
+        "local-circuit fallback failed (exit_code=${fallback_exit}, duration_s=${fallback_duration_s})"
+    fi
+  fi
+
   TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_RUN_STATUS="fail"
   TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_RUN_REASON_CODE="$failure_reason"
   TELEMETRY_ADAPTER_RUN_MESSAGE="stage ${stage} failed (reason_code=${failure_reason}, exit_code=${exit_code}, duration_s=${duration_s})"
